item.title:
✨ Imagination is Productivity - Hailuo in Cannes
We took the center stage in Cannes, engaging wi...
item.description:
✨ Imagination is Productivity - Hailuo in Cannes
We took the center stage in Cannes, engaging with the creators on a singular truth: Technology answers the "How," but only humans can answer "What is good."
Our mission is to build direct bridge between creator's mind and final screen. And our vision is to liberate creation from the constraints of technology, letting imagination take the lead.
The wait is almost over. Intelligence with everyone. #MiniMax #Hailuo
--- @Hailuo_AI | ❤️ 11 | 🔁 1 | 💬 4 | 👁 291
item.author: @Hailuo_AI
